Class Activity

java.lang.Object
sims.actions.Activity
public class Activity extends Object
Represents an activity that a Sim can perform in the Sims world. An Activity has a name, duration, impacted need, value, and optional cost. Activities affect a Sim's needs and may also incur a financial cost.

This class provides methods to perform the activity, retrieve its properties, and apply its effects to a Sim.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Activity(String name, int duration, String impactedNeed, int value)
    Constructs an Activity with no financial cost.
    Activity(String name, int duration, String impactedNeed, int value, double cost)
    Constructs an Activity with a specified financial cost.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    gainXP()
    Placeholder method for awarding experience points (XP) to a Sim when performing this activity.
    double
    getCost()
    Returns the financial cost of performing this activity.
    int
    getDuration()
    Returns the duration of the activity in world time units.
    String
    getImpactedNeed()
    Returns the need impacted by this activity.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of the activity.
    int
    getValue()
    Returns the value by which the impacted need is modified.
    void
    performActivity(Sim sim)
    Performs the activity on the given Sim, updating the Sim's needs based on the impacted need and value.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Activity

      public Activity(String name, int duration, String impactedNeed, int value)
      Constructs an Activity with no financial cost.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the activity
      duration - the duration of the activity in world time units
      impactedNeed - the need impacted by this activity (e.g., Hunger, Energy)
      value - the value by which the impacted need is modified

    • Activity

      public Activity(String name, int duration, String impactedNeed, int value, double cost)
      Constructs an Activity with a specified financial cost.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the activity
      duration - the duration of the activity in world time units
      impactedNeed - the need impacted by this activity (e.g., Hunger, Energy)
      value - the value by which the impacted need is modified
      cost - the cost to perform the activity

  • Method Details

    • getCost

      public double getCost()
      Returns the financial cost of performing this activity.
      Returns:
      the cost of the activity

    • gainXP

      public void gainXP()
      Placeholder method for awarding experience points (XP) to a Sim when performing this activity. Currently not implemented.

    • getImpactedNeed

      public String getImpactedNeed()
      Returns the need impacted by this activity.
      Returns:
      the impacted need (e.g., Hunger, Energy)

    • performActivity

      public void performActivity(Sim sim)
      Performs the activity on the given Sim, updating the Sim's needs based on the impacted need and value.
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim performing the activity

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the activity.
      Returns:
      the activity name

    • getDuration

      public int getDuration()
      Returns the duration of the activity in world time units.
      Returns:
      the activity duration

    • getValue

      public int getValue()
      Returns the value by which the impacted need is modified.
      Returns:
      the activity's effect value
